name: pi-lean-ctx
description_en: Pi Coding Agent extension — routes bash/read/grep/find/ls through lean-ctx for strong token savings. The embedded MCP bridge (on by default) adds a persistent session cache so unchanged re-reads cost ~13 tokens.
description_zh: Pi Coding Agent 扩展 — 将 bash/read/grep/find/ls 路由到 lean-ctx 以实现显著的 token 节省。嵌入式 MCP 桥（默认开启）添加持久会话缓存，因此未更改的重新读取仅需约 13 个 token。
